source: Aetna Simplified Specialty Policy (mock - not proprietary)

required_criteria.description: Documented diagnosis of moderate-to-severe rheumatoid arthritis (or other approved indication).
Trial and failure of at least TWO conventional DMARDs (e.g., methotrexate and sulfasalazine) (Aetna step therapy).
Negative tuberculosis (TB) screening prior to initiating therapy.
Prescribed by or in consultation with a rheumatologist or appropriate specialist.
Documented objective disease-activity score (e.g., DAS28, CDAI) supporting moderate-to-severe activity.

supporting_evidence: Aetna Simplified Specialty Pharmacy Policy (mock summary)
Step therapy requires two conventional DMARD failures (mock)
